RUNESMITH2-ACCELERATE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}.
[gold]Break[/gold] your oldest Rune to draw {ExtraCards:diff()} more card{ExtraCards:plural:|s}.
RUNESMITH2-ACCELERATE.title: Accelerate
RUNESMITH2-ADAMANTIUM_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Whenever you [gold]Enhance[/gold] another card, this card gains [gold]Enhance[/gold] by the same amount.
RUNESMITH2-ADAMANTIUM_HAMMER.title: Adamantium Hammer
RUNESMITH2-AETUS.title: Aetus
RUNESMITH2-ALBUS.title: Albus
RUNESMITH2-ALL_IN_ONE.description:
[gold]Break[/gold] ALL your Runes except your newest one.
Give your newest Rune the [gold]Charges[/gold] and [gold]Potency[/gold] of ALL [gold]Broken[/gold] Runes.
RUNESMITH2-ALL_IN_ONE.title: All in One
RUNESMITH2-ARCHITECTS_FORGE.description: At the end of combat, you may [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card with [purple]Forged[/purple] {Amount:diff()}.
RUNESMITH2-ARCHITECTS_FORGE.title: Architect's Forge
RUNESMITH2-ASSEMBLER.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [gold]Recipe[/gold] card in your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
At the start of your turn, play a copy of it.
RUNESMITH2-ASSEMBLER.title: Assembler
RUNESMITH2-AUGMENTED_BODY.description:
At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] ALL [gold]Improved[/gold] cards.{IfUpgraded:show:
[gold]Stasis[/gold] ALL cards in your hand.}
RUNESMITH2-AUGMENTED_BODY.title: Augmented Body
RUNESMITH2-BACKUP_BATTERY.title: Backup Battery
RUNESMITH2-CALM_BEFORE_STORM.description: Next turn, draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} and [gold]Enhance[/gold] ALL cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-CALM_BEFORE_STORM.title: Calm Before Storm
RUNESMITH2-CATALYTIC_CONVERTER.title: Catalytic Converter
RUNESMITH2-CHARGED_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Give ALL your Runes {ChargeGain:diff()} [gold]Charge{ChargeGain:plural:|s}[/gold] and trigger their passive abilities.
RUNESMITH2-CHARGED_HAMMER.title: Charged Hammer
RUNESMITH2-CHISEL_STRIKE.title: Coup de burin
RUNESMITH2-CHROMA_CHISEL.title: Chroma Chisel
RUNESMITH2-COMPLETE_CIRCUIT.description:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
Donnez {ChargeGain:diff()} [gold]Charge{ChargeGain:plural:|s}[/gold] à TOUTES vos Runes.
RUNESMITH2-COMPLETE_CIRCUIT.title: Circuit fermé
RUNESMITH2-CREATOR_FORM.description: At the start of your turn, [gold]Enhance[/gold] a card by {Amount:diff()}.
RUNESMITH2-CREATOR_FORM.title: Creator Form
RUNESMITH2-CURTAIN_OF_FLAMES.title: Curtain of Flames
RUNESMITH2-DEFEND_RUNESMITH.title: Défense
RUNESMITH2-DOUBLE_UP.title: Double Up
RUNESMITH2-DRY_ICE.title: Glace carbonique
RUNESMITH2-DUCT_TAPE.description: [gold]Stasis[/gold] the first non-[gold]Stasis[/gold] card you [gold]Enhance[/gold] each turn.
RUNESMITH2-DUCT_TAPE.title: Duct Tape
RUNESMITH2-DUPLICATE.description:
[gold]Craft[/gold] a copy of your newest Rune.{IfFull:
[red](Rune Slots are full)[/red]|}
RUNESMITH2-DUPLICATE.title: Duplicate
RUNESMITH2-EARTH_SHIELD.title: Bouclier terrestre
RUNESMITH2-ELECTROCUTE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and put {Cards:plural:it|them} on top.
[gold]Stasis[/gold] the card{Cards:plural:|s} if possible.
RUNESMITH2-ELECTROCUTE.selectionScreenPr: Choose {Amount} card{Amount:plural:|s} to put on top of the [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and give {Amount:plural:it|them} [gold]Stasis[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-ELECTROCUTE.title: Electrocute
RUNESMITH2-ELECTROMAGNET.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put an [gold]Improved[/gold] card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-ELECTROMAGNET.selectionScreen: Choose a card to put back into your Hand.
RUNESMITH2-ELECTROMAGNET.title: Electromagnet
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTAL_DECAY.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] up to {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}.
Gain {elements:rs2Icon(all)} equal to the card{Cards:plural:'s|s'} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} cost.
RUNESMITH2-ELEMENTAL_DECAY.title: Elemental Decay
RUNESMITH2-EMPOWERMENT.description:
Gain {Elements:rs2Icon()}.
Gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equals to your {elements:rs2Icon(ignis)}.
Gain [gold]Brace[/gold] equals to your {elements:rs2Icon(terra)}.
Gain [gold]Amp[/gold] equals to your {elements:rs2Icon(aqua)}.
RUNESMITH2-EMPOWERMENT.title: Empowerment
RUNESMITH2-ENERGY_SINK.description:
ALL your Runes lose {ChargeLoss:diff()} [gold]Charge{ChargeLoss:plural:|s}[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:| and {PotencyLoss:diff()} [gold]Potency[/gold]}.
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each [gold]Charge[/gold] lost.
RUNESMITH2-ENERGY_SINK.title: Energy Sink
RUNESMITH2-ENGRAVED_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Enhance[/gold] is twice as effective on this card.
RUNESMITH2-ENGRAVED_HAMMER.title: Engraved Hammer
RUNESMITH2-FISSION_HAMMER.title: Fission Hammer
RUNESMITH2-FLAMMA.title: Flamma
RUNESMITH2-FLOWSTATE.title: Flowstate
RUNESMITH2-FLUMEN.title: Flumen
RUNESMITH2-FORTIFY.title: Fortifier
RUNESMITH2-FROZEN_CHISEL.title: Frozen Chisel
RUNESMITH2-FULGOR.title: Fulgor
RUNESMITH2-GAMMA_RAY_BURST.description:
Trigger the passive abilities of ALL your Runes {IfUpgraded:show:X+{Amount:diff()}|X} times.
[gold]Break[/gold] ALL your Runes with 0 [gold]Charges[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-GAMMA_RAY_BURST.title: Gamma Ray Burst
RUNESMITH2-GELID_CANISTER.title: Gelid Canister
RUNESMITH2-GLACIES.title: Glacies
RUNESMITH2-GLADIUS.title: Gladius
RUNESMITH2-GRAND_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Enhance[/gold] ALL cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]{EnhanceBy:rs2Plural:| by {EnhanceBy:diff()}}.
RUNESMITH2-GRAND_HAMMER.title: Grand Hammer
RUNESMITH2-GRINDSTONE.description:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} [gold]Armure[/gold].
{Amount:plural:Ce tour-ci|Pendant {Amount:diff()} tours}, chaque fois que vous jouez une carte, [gold]Améliorez[/gold]-la. Si la carte ne peut pas être [gold]Améliorée[/gold], [gold]Renforcez[/gold]-la à la place.
RUNESMITH2-GRINDSTONE.title: Meule
RUNESMITH2-HAMMER_AND_CHISEL.description:
Add a random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded [/gold]|}[gold]Hammer[/gold] card and a random {IfUpgraded:show:[gold]Upgraded [/gold]|}[gold]Chisel[/gold] card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
They cost {Energy:energyIcons()} less this combat.
RUNESMITH2-HAMMER_AND_CHISEL.title: Hammer and Chisel
RUNESMITH2-HAMMER_SWING.title: Coup de marteau
RUNESMITH2-HAMMER_TORNADO.title: Hammer Tornado
RUNESMITH2-HEAT_EXCHANGE.description:
Gagnez {Ignis:rs2Icon()} pour chaque ennemi.
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts à TOUS les ennemis.
RUNESMITH2-HEAT_EXCHANGE.title: Échange thermique
RUNESMITH2-HIT_AND_RUN.title: Délit de fuite
RUNESMITH2-HOT_HAMMER.description:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
[gold]Renforcez[/gold] {Cards:diff()} carte{Cards:plural:|s} au hasard{EnhanceBy:rs2Plural:| de {EnhanceBy:diff()}}.
RUNESMITH2-HOT_HAMMER.title: Marteau brûlant
RUNESMITH2-HUNKER_DOWN.title: Retranchement
RUNESMITH2-INCENDIUM.title: Incendium
RUNESMITH2-LASER_TURRET.description: Whenever you gain {elements:rs2Icon(all)}, deal damage to ALL enemies equal to {Amount:diff()} times the number of {elements:rs2Icon(all)} gained.
RUNESMITH2-LASER_TURRET.title: Laser Turret
RUNESMITH2-LITHIUM_ION.description:
Gain {Aqua:rs2Icon()}.
At the start of your turn, spend 1 {Aqua:rs2Icon(0)} to gain {Amount:diff()} [gold]Amp[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-LITHIUM_ION.title: Lithium Ion
RUNESMITH2-MAGMA.title: Magma
RUNESMITH2-MAKESHIFT_ARMOR.description:
Gagnez {Block:diff()} [gold]Armure[/gold].
[gold]Brisez[/gold] votre plus ancienne Rune pour gagner {Block:diff()} [gold]Armure[/gold] de plus.
RUNESMITH2-MAKESHIFT_ARMOR.title: Armure de fortune
RUNESMITH2-METAL_FORMING.title: Metal Forming
RUNESMITH2-MOLTEN_CHISEL.title: Burin en fusion
RUNESMITH2-MORBUS.title: Morbus
RUNESMITH2-MUNDUS.title: Mundus
RUNESMITH2-ORIGO.title: Origo
RUNESMITH2-OVERLOAD.description:
Give your oldest Rune {ChargeGain:diff()} [gold]Charge{ChargeGain:plural:|s}[/gold].
If it has at least {Threshold} [gold]Charges[/gold], trigger its passive ability for each [gold]Charge[/gold] and [gold]Break[/gold] it.
RUNESMITH2-OVERLOAD.title: Overload
RUNESMITH2-PARTICLE_ACCELERATOR.descript:
Runes are [gold]Crafted[/gold] with {Amount:diff()} additional [gold]Charge{Amount:plural:|s}[/gold].
Runes trigger their passive abilities an additional time.
RUNESMITH2-PARTICLE_ACCELERATOR.title: Particle Accelerator
RUNESMITH2-PERFECT_CHISEL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
ALL your Runes gain {Potency:diff()} [gold]Potency[/gold].
The [gold]Potency[/gold] gain can be [gold]Enhanced[/gold] and [gold]Amped[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-PERFECT_CHISEL.title: Perfect Chisel
RUNESMITH2-POWERED_ANVIL.title: Powered Anvil
RUNESMITH2-PRISMA.title: Prisma
RUNESMITH2-QUICK_CHARGE.description: Donnez {ChargeGain:diff()} [gold]Charge{ChargeGain:plural:|s}[/gold] à votre plus ancienne [gold]Rune[/gold] et déclenchez sa capacité passive.
RUNESMITH2-QUICK_CHARGE.title: Charge rapide
RUNESMITH2-REDUCE_ENTROPY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Apply {IceColdPower:diff()} [gold]Ice-Cold[/gold] to ALL enemies.
Gain {SelfIceColdPower:diff()} [gold]Ice-Cold[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-REDUCE_ENTROPY.title: Reduce Entropy
RUNESMITH2-REFINE.title: Refine
RUNESMITH2-REINFORCE.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] {IfUpgraded:show:and [gold]Enhance[/gold] |}ALL cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]{IfUpgraded:show:{EnhanceBy:rs2Plural:| by {EnhanceBy:diff()}}|}.
RUNESMITH2-REINFORCE.title: Reinforce
RUNESMITH2-RESUPPLY.description:
Shuffle ALL [gold]Improved[/gold] cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s}.
RUNESMITH2-RESUPPLY.title: Resupply
RUNESMITH2-RUNESONANCE.description:
Set the [gold]Charges[/gold] of ALL your Runes to the [gold]Charge[/gold] of your newest Rune{IfUpgraded:show: +1|}.{HasRune:{InCombat:
(Set [gold]Charge[/gold] to {ChargeSet})|}|}
RUNESMITH2-RUNESONANCE.title: Runesonance
RUNESMITH2-RUNE_HURL.description:
[gold]Brisez[/gold] votre plus ancienne Rune pour infliger {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Si vous n'avez aucune Rune, piochez {Cards:diff()} carte{Cards:plural:|s}.
RUNESMITH2-RUNE_HURL.title: Jet de Rune
RUNESMITH2-RUNIC_FORCEFIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you [gold]Craft[/gold] a Rune, put this card into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-RUNIC_FORCEFIELD.title: Runic Forcefield
RUNESMITH2-SAXUM.title: Saxum
RUNESMITH2-SCRAP.description:
Ne peut être jouée que si vous avez une Rune.
[gold]Brisez[/gold] votre plus ancienne Rune{BreakCount:plural:| {BreakCount:diff()} fois}.
Renvoyez cette carte dans votre [gold]Main[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-SCRAP.title: Ferraille
RUNESMITH2-SCRAPPER.description:
Whenever a Rune is [gold]Broken[/gold], ALL your Runes gain {Amount:diff()} [gold]Charge{Amount:plural:|s}[/gold].
Add [gold]Scrap[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
RUNESMITH2-SCRAPPER.title: Scrapper
RUNESMITH2-SEARCH_ENGINE.description: Whenever you [gold]Craft[/gold] a Rune, draw {Amount:diff()} card{Amount:plural:|s}.
RUNESMITH2-SEARCH_ENGINE.title: Search Engine
RUNESMITH2-SECRET_RECIPE.description:
Choose 1 of {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Recipe[/gold] cards to add into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
It's free to play this turn.
RUNESMITH2-SECRET_RECIPE.title: Secret Recipe
RUNESMITH2-SHIFTING_HAMMER.title: Marteau changeant
RUNESMITH2-SHINING_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Enhance[/gold] ALL your other [gold]Hammer[/gold] cards{EnhanceBy:rs2Plural:| by {EnhanceBy:diff()}}.
RUNESMITH2-SHINING_HAMMER.title: Shining Hammer
RUNESMITH2-SHOCK_THERAPY.title: Shock Therapy
RUNESMITH2-STABILIZE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Set the [gold]Charges[/gold] of ALL your Runes with at least 1 [gold]Charge[/gold] to {ChargeGain:diff()}.
RUNESMITH2-STABILIZE.title: Stabilize
RUNESMITH2-STATIC_CAGE.title: Cage statique
RUNESMITH2-STEAMING_CHISEL.description:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Gagnez {Block:diff()} [gold]Armure[/gold].
Appliquez {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Faiblesse[/gold].
Gagnez {Ignis:rs2Icon()} et {Aqua:rs2Icon()}.
RUNESMITH2-STEAMING_CHISEL.title: Burin fumant
RUNESMITH2-STRIKE_RUNESMITH.title: Frappe
RUNESMITH2-SYNTHETIC_BLOOD.description:
{Amount:plural:This turn|For {Amount:diff()} turns}, you lose[/center][br][center]{elements:rs2Icon(ignis)} {elements:rs2Icon(terra)} {elements:rs2Icon(aqua)} before losing HP.
Gain {Elements:rs2Icon()}.
RUNESMITH2-SYNTHETIC_BLOOD.title: Synthetic Blood
RUNESMITH2-TELEPORT.description:
Give another player a copy of your newest Rune{IfUpgraded:show: with {ChargeGain:diff()} additional [gold]Charge{ChargeGain:plural:|s}[/gold]}.
[gold]Break[/gold] your newest Rune.
RUNESMITH2-TELEPORT.title: Teleport
RUNESMITH2-TRITIUM.title: Tritium
RUNESMITH2-VULCANUS.title: Vulcanus
RUNESMITH2-WATCH_OUT.description:
Another player gains {BracePower:diff()} [gold]Brace[/gold].
[gold]Enhance[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card{Cards:plural:|s} in the player's hand{EnhanceBy:rs2Plural:| by {EnhanceBy:diff()}} at random.
RUNESMITH2-WATCH_OUT.title: Watch Out!
RUNESMITH2-WHITE_BALANCE.description:
Infligez {Damage:diff()} dégâts.
Si vous avez au moins 1 de chaque {elements:rs2Icon(all)}, gagnez {Energy:energyIcons()}.
RUNESMITH2-WHITE_BALANCE.title: Balance des blancs
RUNESMITH2-WILDFIRE.description:
Gain {Ignis:rs2Icon()} and {Terra:rs2Icon()}.
At the start of your turn, gain {Amount:diff()} {elements:rs2Icon(ignis)} and {Amount:diff()} {elements:rs2Icon(terra)}.
RUNESMITH2-WILDFIRE.title: Wildfire
